title: Nursery Rhyme. DCLV. Relics.
content:
Jacky, come give me thy fiddle
            If ever thou mean to thrive;
        Nay, I'll not give my fiddle,
            To any man alive.

        If I should give my fiddle,
            They'll think that I'm gone mad,
        For many a joyful day
            My fiddle and I have had.
meaning:
"Nursery Rhyme. DCLV. Relics." is a quintessential example of Unknown's signature style...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
